description: Enchantment, summoning, time, shadow, and reality-bending abilities that defy natural law.
powers: Set Resonance
Part of a greater whole. Each companion piece amplifies the others, and together they become something far beyond their parts.
Shadow Slip
The item flickers between this world and the shadow realm. One moment solid, the next a dark outline, then solid again.
Ancient Bond
An old soul lingers within. The item connects the wielder to someone long dead, their memories surfacing like dreams.
Telltale Aura
Smoke curls or light pulses from the item, shifting with its mood. The effect is visible before it is felt.
Wellspring
Energy flows from the item like water from a spring. The wielder draws strength simply by holding it.
Growing Hunger
Each use makes the item larger. It feeds on purpose, swelling with every act until it becomes something unwieldy.
Crowd Surge
The item draws from nearby life. More people, more power. In solitude it sleeps. In a crowd it roars.
Deepening
Every use leaves the item stronger than before. Repeated purpose hones it, like a blade sharpened by cutting.
Old Magic
Something ancient and unknowable stirs within. The item predates every known tradition. Its power has no proper name.
Far Reach
The item's influence stretches far beyond the wielder's arm. It touches what should be out of reach.
Distant Thread
A faint connection runs from this item to a faraway spellcaster. Power trickles through, but so does awareness.
Coveted
Others want it. The item draws covetous eyes wherever it goes. Something about it demands to be possessed.
Lost Origin
No scholar can place it. The civilization that made this item left no other trace. Only this remains.
Blessed Link
A benevolent power watches through this item. The wielder is noticed, favored, gently guided by something vast and kind.
Carefree Aura
Worry melts away near this item. The bearer becomes lighter, easier, unburdened. Perhaps dangerously so.
Shadow Pull
The item reaches into dark places and drags things back. Entities and energies from the shadow realm answer its call.
Veil Thinner
The boundary between worlds grows fragile near this item. Shadows deepen, whispers arrive from nowhere, and the air feels thin.
Light Yearning
Something in the item strains toward goodness. It was made for darker purposes but resists them, pulling toward the light.
Lingering Effect
The item's power does not fade quickly. Long after use, its influence persists, settling into the world like a stain.
Permanent Mark
What this item does cannot be undone. Its effects become part of reality, as fixed as stone, as certain as gravity.
Phantom Decoy
An illusory double of the wielder splits away and moves on its own. It looks real enough to fool most eyes.
Tiny Familiar
A small elemental creature answers the item's summons. It is loyal, curious, and not entirely predictable.
Silence Field
All sound dies in the item's presence. Words, footsteps, screams. Everything swallowed by a suffocating quiet.
Vanishing Act
The item disappears when released. It waits unseen wherever it fell, invisible and patient.
Starlight Ceiling
An illusion of the night sky spreads across any overhead surface. Stars wheel slowly, beautiful and impossible.
Lodestone Touch
Metal objects yield to the item's magnetic will. Drawn close or pushed away, iron bends to its whim.
Vine Rope
Living vines erupt from the item and weave themselves into a sturdy climbing line. They grip any surface.
Harmonic Echo
Music struck near this item is caught and multiplied. Notes return richer, layered with impossible harmonies.
Daybreak Orb
Brilliant light blooms from the item on command. Pure as sunlight, warm as morning, pushing back every shadow.
Glass Memory
Shattered glass reassembles at this item's touch. Fragments fly together and seal without seam or crack.
Scent Cloak
The wielder's scent vanishes completely. No hound can track them, no creature can smell them coming.
Flavor Read
Food reveals its emotional history to the wielder's tongue. Meals cooked in anger taste sharp. Love tastes like honey.
Sky Script
Letters of light appear in the night sky, written large enough to be read from far away. A message for the world.
Truth Quill
Any pen that touches this item writes only the truth. The hand may try to lie, but the ink refuses.
Stone Engrave
Spoken words etch themselves into nearby rock. Every syllable carved as if by a patient sculptor's hand.
Thought Image
The wielder imagines a creature and it appears as a silent, flickering image. Lifelike but hollow.
Rune Trail
Glowing symbols appear in the wielder's footsteps. A luminous path that marks where they have been.
Sand Glass
Sand becomes molten and reshapes itself into delicate glass forms at the wielder's touch. Fragile beauty from dust.
Star Chart
Glowing constellations appear in the air around the item, slowly rotating. They point the way and name the directions.
Stolen Moment
Time stops for everything but the wielder. A single frozen heartbeat to act while the world holds its breath.
Birth Blessing
A newborn touched by this item is marked by fortune. Good luck clings to them like a second skin.
Force Anchor
An immovable point of force materializes and locks into place. What it holds stays held, absolutely and without question.
Synesthesia
Sound becomes color. Music paints the air in shifting patterns, visible and beautiful. Silence returns the world to grey.
Gentle Lift
Objects rise from the ground at the wielder's will, hovering in place or drifting where directed. Effortless control.
Force Door
A door of solid energy appears on any flat surface. It opens, closes, and locks like any door, but nothing can break it.
Gilded Page
A single page turns to pure gold. The words are lost but the wealth remains. The item allows this rarely.
Time Drag
The world slows around the wielder. Others move through honey while the wielder acts at normal speed. A stolen advantage.
